VAL-DOWNLOAD-001.evidence: Unit tests TestPlaylistParserSingleView and TestPlaylistParserMultiView verify correct left/right view boundary parsing. Parser uses #EXT-X-DISCONTINUITY marker to distinguish first/second view chunks and extracts encryption key URL from #EXT-X-KEY header.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-002.evidence: Code inspection confirms audio-only path: joinAudioOutput() calls JoinChunksFromM3U8AudioOnly() which outputs audio files with requested format (mp3, m4a, aac, opus). No video artifact required - uses -vn flag in ffmpeg.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-003.evidence: joinVideoOutput() produces expected view artifacts based on config.Views: 'left' produces left view only, 'right' produces right view only, 'both' produces combined output via JoinViews(). Artifact naming follows pattern 'LEC {seqNo} {title} LEFT/RIGHT VIEW.mp4'.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-004.evidence: tryStoredToken() reads .token file, validates against /user/profile endpoint. If valid, reuses token; if invalid or missing, login() performs fresh authentication and stores new token.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-005.evidence: All upstream operations return explicit errors: GetCourses, GetLectures, GetPlaylists, getStreamInfos all check status codes and return formatted errors with status code and body. Stream lookup failures return descriptive error messages.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-006.evidence: downloadWithRetry() has maxRetries parameter (default 3). Uses exponential backoff with retryDelay(). After max attempts, returns aggregated error with all failure details.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-007.evidence: LecturePipeline uses ordered chunk collection via buildOrderedList() which maintains chunk order by ID. Collect() method assembles FirstViewChunks and SecondViewChunks in correct sequence regardless of download order.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-008.evidence: ProgressTracker bounds progress to 0-100% with explicit clamp logic. GetOverallProgress() caps at 100. GetETA() capped at 99h59m max. Speed returns 0 if insufficient samples, avoiding nonsensical values.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-009.evidence: Unit test TestSelectLectureRangeValidAndInvalidRanges verifies correct slice selection. selectLectureRange() converts 1-indexed input to correct 0-indexed array access, handles default (0,0) as full range, and validates bounds.

VAL-DOWNLOAD-010.evidence: Unit test TestFilterEmptyLecturesRemovesNoClassAndNoLectureVariants confirms filtering of 'no class', 'no lecture' variants. filterEmptyLectures() removes these entries deterministically before download processing.
